description: This file defines a Java interface that extends Spring Data JPA's JpaRepository for managing User entities, including custom query methods findByEmail and findByActive.

classes.name: UserRepository
classes.description: Repository interface for User entities providing data access methods.

methods.name: findByEmail
methods.description: Retrieves an Optional<User> by email address.

methods.name: findByActive
methods.description: Retrieves a paginated list of Users filtered by their active status.
